name: I hurt my shoulder months ago on the job in Ogden but symptoms worsened—what to do?
description: Report worsening now; link to original via medicals.

mainEntity.name: I hurt my shoulder months ago on the job in Ogden but symptoms worsened—what to do?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report worsening now; link to original via medicals.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Notify employer of worsened condition linking to original injury; file/amend workers' comp claim promptly.** Delayed symptoms common in construction[3]. **Key factors:** 1. Utah allows claims if connected. 2. Deadlines from awareness. 3. Medical proof needed. 4. Third-party if negligence. See doctor for records tying to accident. Lawyer extends timelines if needed.
